I have two cats and one dog.

ja_transcribed: [履歴|り|れき][書|しょ]を[少|すこ]し[書|か]き[換|か]えました。
en: I've made some changes to my resume.
I've rewritten my resume a little.
I've rewritten my resume a bit.

ja_transcribed: [猫|ねこ]がドアをカリカリしてるわ。
en: The cat is scratching at my door.

ja_transcribed: [猫|ねこ]が[話|はな]せたら、[何|なん]て[言|い]うかな？
en: If cats could talk, what would they say?

ja_transcribed: うちの[猫|ねこ]、[何|なに]もしないのよね。
[見|み]て。[屋根|や|ね]の[上|うえ]に[猫|ねこ]がいるよ。
en: Look, there's a cat on top of the roof.
Look! There's a cat on the roof.
